game.draft_picked_self: You order $t({{card}}). Waiting for the rest of the table.
game.draft_picked_two_self: You order $t({{card}}) and $t({{card2}}). Waiting for the rest of the table.
game.draft_repicked_two_self: You change your order to $t({{card}}) and $t({{card2}}).
game.draft_extra_returned: {{player}} spends their $t({{extra}}): they rejoin the passing tray
game.draft_extra_returned_self: You spend your $t({{extra}}): they rejoin the tray you pass
game.draft_revealed_boosted_self: You help yourself to $t({{card}}) with your $t({{multiplier}}) (times {{factor}})
game.draft_hands_passed: The tray belt turns: {{count}} tapas on each.
game.draft_dessert_bonus: {{player}} gains {{points}} for hoarding the most desserts ({{count}}): {{total}} overall
game.draft_dessert_bonus_self: You gain {{points}} for hoarding the most desserts ({{count}}): {{total}} overall
game.draft_dessert_penalty: {{player}} loses {{points}} for ending with the fewest desserts ({{count}}): {{total}} overall
